title: selaginella distans
intro: Selaginella distans is a type of species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as the spikemoss plant due to its needle-like leaves that resemble a spike. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella distans include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
